human_approval_status.note: Approval withheld due to unresolved governance risk.

management_review_status.note: Escalate to Audit and Review Department for unresolved blocker set.

autonomous_continuation_note: Autonomous continuation remains not approved unless explicitly approved through the required governance process.
retained_constraints: latest-alias outputs remain advisory-only for risky work
no live provider activation while hard-gate concerns remain unresolved
rollback_disable_expectation: Do not activate limited live provider use; maintain disabled state and route all related work through REVIEW escalation.
follow_up_actions_before_broader_live_us: Resolve cross-department ownership and escalation destination.
Complete rollback/disable procedure review with management sign-off.
rationale: Governance blockers require formal review and escalation before any activation consideration.
